name: Trumna
description: An ancient weapon designed by the Entrati. Primary fire siphons life essence from the target to fuel a devastating secondary fire. A heavy, oversized automatic rifle with withering fire that delivers rapid heat damage. Secondary fire unleashes an arcing projectile that ricochets off surfaces and enemies, exploding on every impact.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: An ancient weapon designed by the Entrati. Primary fire siphons life essence from the target to fuel a devastating secondary fire. A heavy, oversized automatic rifle with withering fire that delivers rapid heat damage. Secondary fire unleashes an arcing projectile that ricochets off surfaces and enemies, exploding on every impact.

components.name: Seriglass Shard
components.description:
Once part of an intricate Entrati apparatus, now shattered and bearing a sharp edge.

Location: Grandmother in the Necralisk on Deimos

patchlogs.name: Lua’s Prey: Hotfix 32.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Battacor’s alt-fire, Mausolon, and Trumna causing self damage instead of self stagger.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: TennoGen: Update 30.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Trumna Stock icon in Father’s Wares depicting that it’s a Prime Stock and not a standard Stock.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Nezha Prime: 29.3.0 + 29.3.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed audio issues for fully charged Trumna sound for Host/Client.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.0.6
patchlogs.changes: Tweaked reload sounds of the Trumna.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Sepulcrum and Trumna local firing sounds playing for Clients.
Fixed missing Trumna Alt Fire animations.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Entrati Weapon Syndicate member missing the Trumna Stock Blueprint.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Update 29
patchlogs.fixes: *Acquire the Blueprints and Components for the Trumna from the Entrati Syndicate Weapons member!
